mapper.select:
select id, name, canteen_name, logo_url, contact_phone, audit_status, recommended from campus_merchant
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or canteen_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc

select id, name, canteen_name, logo_url, contact_phone, audit_status, recommended from campus_merchant
id in
#{merchantId}
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or canteen_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
select id, name, canteen_name, logo_url, contact_phone, audit_status, recommended from campus_merchant where audit_status = 'APPROVED' order by recommended desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_merchant (name, canteen_name, logo_url, contact_phone, audit_status, recommended) values (#{name}, #{canteenName}, #{logoUrl}, #{contactPhone}, #{auditStatus}, #{recommended})
mapper.update: update campus_merchant set name = #{name}, canteen_name = #{canteenName}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, recommended = #{recommended} where id = #{id}
